title: Darren Chung
content:
People.ContactEmail dchung@mccarthy.ca
- British Columbia, 2021
- University of Calgary
Clients look to Darren for his practical and analytical approach to delivering effective solutions for their complex tax issues.
Darren is an associate in our National Tax Group in our Calgary office. He maintains a broad tax planning practice, with a focus on mergers and acquisitions and corporate reorganizations.
Prior to joining McCarthy Tétrault, Darren practised in the tax group of an international law firm and a law firm affiliated with an accounting firm.
Darren received his Juris Doctor and Bachelor of Commerce (with Distinction) from the University of Calgary. Darren was called to the Alberta Bar in 2019 and the British Columbia Bar in 2021. He has also completed all three years of the CPA Canada In-Depth Tax Program, the CPA Canada Corporate Reorganizations course, and the CPTS Canadian Energy Taxation course.
He is a member of the Law Society of Alberta, the Canadian Bar Association, the Canadian Tax Foundation, the International Fiscal Association, and the Canadian Petroleum Tax Society.
